dict.string:
KEY=$(echo "$1" | sed 's/^cal//' | sed 's/^_//')
osascript \ -e 'tell application "TickTick" to activate' \ -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "TickTick" to click menu item "Open \"Calendar\"" of menu "List" of menu bar 1'
if [ -n "$KEY" ]; then case "$KEY" in 1) KC=18 ;; w) KC=13 ;; m) KC=46 ;; y) KC=16 ;; esac sleep 0.8 osascript \ -e 'tell application "System Events"' \ -e ' key up {command, option, control, shift}' \ -e ' delay 0.4' \ -e " key code $KC" \ -e 'end tell' fi
Add a task, subtask, list, note...
Search Lists, Sections, Tasks, Subtasks, Subsubtasks...
What do you want to do?
Add a new task to TickTick

[{"title": "Sync", "arg": "1-", "subtitle": "Refresh cache ⌃ 🔙"}, {"title": "Login", "arg": "5-", "subtitle": "Get token ⌃ 🔙"}, {"title": "Refresh TickTick", "arg": "6-", "subtitle": "Refresh app ⌃ 🔙"}, {"title": "Help • TickAL Docs", "arg": "7-", "subtitle": "GitHub · TickAL ⌃ 🔙"}, {"title": "Attachment Token", "arg": "8-", "subtitle": "Save v2 token from clipboard ⌃ 🔙"}, {"title": "Attachment Login", "arg": "9-", "subtitle": "One-time sign-in for attachments & auto-config ⌃ 🔙"}]
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "TickTick" to click menu item "Sync" of menu "File" of menu bar 1' >/dev/null 2>&1 printf '%s' "$1"
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_open:daily"'

KEY=$(echo "$1" | sed 's/^cal//' | sed 's/^_//')
osascript \ -e 'tell application "TickTick" to activate' \ -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "TickTick" to click menu item "Open \"Calendar\"" of menu "List" of menu bar 1'
if [ -n "$KEY" ]; then case "$KEY" in 1) KC=18 ;; w) KC=13 ;; m) KC=46 ;; y) KC=16 ;; esac sleep 0.8 osascript \ -e 'tell application "System Events"' \ -e ' key up {command, option, control, shift}' \ -e ' delay 0.4' \ -e " key code $KC" \ -e 'end tell' fi
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_open:weekly"'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_open:monthly"'
Add a new task to TickTick
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "pn "'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_open:quarterly"'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_open:yearly"'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "f "'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_journal:morning"'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "v "'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "XAct" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "xact:pn_journal:evening"'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "g "'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "pn $ "'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "pn day "'
⌘ Save ⇧ Open ⌥⌘ Task URL ⌘⇧ Description URLs ⌃ Clear Description
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "pn + "'
osascript -e 'tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to run trigger "Search" in workflow "com.vex.tickal" with argument "pn today "'

**TickAL - TickTick, without opening TickTick.** One hotkey (or `tal`) opens your whole TickTick world in Alfred: browse, search, add, schedule, tag, complete, focus - every change mirrored instantly in a local cache. 📖 Full docs: [GitHub · TickAL](https://github.com/vex-glitch/TickAL-TickTick-Alfred-Workflow) - or run `tdo`
## Dependencies - Alfred 5 + Powerpack · Python 3 (Homebrew or Xcode CLT - TickAL finds either) - A TickTick account + a free TickTick developer app (2 minutes, steps below) - Optional: `pip3 install pyobjc` for the floating focus bar - focus works without it
## Setup 1. Go to [developer.ticktick.com/manage](https://developer.ticktick.com/manage) → **Create App** → set the redirect URI to `http://localhost:8080` 2. Paste the **Client ID** + **Client Secret** into the fields above 3. Run `tlogin` - a browser opens; log in and approve 4. Run `tsy` to prime the cache 5. Set your main hotkey (top-left node on the canvas) 6. Sign-in to unlock attachments, the Completed view, nested tags, your filters, auto-named folders and your TickTick tag order: `tup` → **Attachment Login** (masked; only a session token is stored) - or paste a token via **Attachment Token** (Sign-in-with-Apple; guide in the docs) 6. *Optional* - CRM / CTA / Projects features: paste your list & folder ids above (the docs show how to copy an id)
## Usage Three chords run everything: **⌥⏎ deeper · ⌘⏎ actions · ⌃⏎ back**. Type to filter any screen. - `tal` main menu · `tse` search · `tad` add · `tup` settings · `tca` calendar - Views: `tod` today · `tom` tomorrow · `tne` next 7 days · `tin` inbox · `tsl` smart lists · `tfi` filters · `tta` tags · `tbu` buffer - `tfo` focus · `tur` save browser tab · `tst` statistics · `tcr` crm · `tsy` sync · `tdo` docs - 💫 Periodic notes: `pn` scope in search - daily / weekly / monthly notes, journals, money log - Add tokens: `*` date · `@` time · `!` priority · `#` tag · `=` note · `[[` task link - or type `/` for the menu
Please consult the docs for all features, how tos and explanations, there is too much to fit in this about. [Docs • TickAL](https://github.com/vex-glitch/TickAL-TickTick-Alfred-Workflow/blob/main/docs/00-index.md)
One-time OAuth connect (after pasting Client ID + Secret).
Login, sync, refresh, docs, attachment token.
The whole workflow from one list. Don't forget to set the keystroke on canvas.
Search everything. Scopes: l lists · t tasks · a all depths · g tags · v smart lists · f filters · n/nc notes.
Add tasks with tokens: * date · @ time · ! priority · # tag · = note · [[ task link - or type / for the menu.
Timer, pomodoro, checkbox staging and the floating focus bar.
Save the active browser tab as a task.
The bookings hub - needs 'CRM list id' below.
All smart lists: Today, Tomorrow, Completed, Habits…
Open the 🅿️ buffer (⌥⇧ on any task row adds to it).
Your custom filters, synced from TickTick after Attachment Login (see the docs).
Pick the one thing for today.
Log a win, nag, thought, or link to today.
Pick any task, schedule it today.

Enables the CRM booking features: Easiest way is searching for list with `tse`, then pressing `⌥⌘` to copy URL, manually trim everything but 24-character id of your bookings list. The docs (tdo) show how to copy an id. Leave blank if unused.
Enables the 📌 Create CTA action: the list where call-to-action tasks are created. Leave blank if unused.
New 💼 projects are created inside this folder. Blank = ungrouped.
Enables 💫 Periodic notes: paste the 24-character id of the list that holds them. Type pn in search to use. Leave blank if unused.
The 💫 weekly note mirrors this list (or task with subtasks) in its ♻️ Weekly Review section - tick boxes in the note, real tasks complete. Paste the 24-character id. Leave blank if unused.
